finding: `tasks audit` returned `ATM_TASKS_AUDIT_WARNINGS` on every clean run because 24 permanent historical warnings were mixed with genuinely actionable new warnings, causing alert fatigue and hiding fresh audit drift.
expectedBehavior: Known benign historical task-audit warnings should remain visible in JSON evidence but be acknowledged by a repo-local baseline so only baseline-external warnings trigger `ATM_TASKS_AUDIT_WARNINGS`. Errors must never be suppressible by the baseline.
evidenceOrRepro: `node atm.mjs tasks audit --json` on 2026-07-08 returned 25 warnings: 4 planning-only done, 20 draft static evidence, and 1 stale framework lock. The stale lock was released; the 24 permanent historical warnings became baseline entries in `docs/governance/tasks-audit-warning-baseline.json`.
followUp: Keep `scripts/validate-task-ledger-governance.ts` coverage that acknowledged warnings stay visible with `acknowledged: true` while `activeFindingCount` drops to zero.
